---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements or corrections to the public VRP documentation.
title: "[Docs] Short description"
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

# Documentation Improvement

Thank you for helping improve the VRP public documentation.

Please complete the information below.

---

## Summary

Provide a short description of the proposed documentation improvement.

---

## Affected Document

Examples:

- README.md
- Deployment Guide
- Architecture Overview
- Validation Model
- Evidence Model
- Report Templates
- Other

---

## Current Behavior

Describe the current documentation.

---

## Suggested Improvement

Describe the proposed improvement.

Examples include:

- clarification;
- correction;
- additional examples;
- improved wording;
- structural improvements.

---

## Motivation

Why would this improvement be helpful?

---

## Impact

Who would benefit?

Examples:

- pilot participants;
- reviewers;
- engineers;
- validation teams;
- contributors.

---

## Additional References

Provide any supporting references or examples if available.

---

## Confidentiality Notice

Please do **not** include:

- protected runtime implementation;
- proprietary engineering details;
- confidential operational procedures;
- internal development information.

This repository documents only the public pilot boundary.
